allow: Bash(psql "postgresql://realestate:realestate@localhost:5432/realestatev2" -t -A -c "SELECT plan, addresses FROM \(SELECT plan, array_agg\(DISTINCT address\) AS addresses FROM qld_cadastre_address WHERE plan LIKE ''SP%'' GROUP BY plan HAVING COUNT\(DISTINCT lot\) BETWEEN 2 AND 6\) sub LIMIT 5")
Bash(psql "postgresql://realestate:realestate@localhost:5432/realestatev2" -t -A -c "SELECT id, display_address, lga_name FROM parcels LIMIT 3")
